title: CIFR Stock Earnings: Cipher Mining Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q4 2023
text: Cipher Mining delivered stronger-than-expected quarterly results. The company reported earnings per share of 11 cents, surpassing analyst projections by 15 basis points. The dramatic revenue outperformance was particularly notable, with the firm generating $126.84 million compared to forecasts of just $41.78 million—more than double analyst estimates. Q4 2023 marked the company's first quarter of operations since inception with all four of their data centers being fully deployed, and they delivered positive GAAP earnings for the quarter. For the full year 2023, adjusted GAAP results yielded an adjusted earnings gain of $46.2 million versus an adjusted earnings loss of $64.9 million in the previous year. The earnings report demonstrated that Cipher Mining exceeded expectations for both earnings per share and revenue in Q4 2023. The earnings announcement was published automatically through InvestorPlace's data-driven reporting system, which uses TradeSmith data to promptly disseminate quarterly results without manual editorial review.
